prestazioni: LS2 (6.0L Gen IV V8) engine rebuild with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.5:1 CR), Callies Compstar crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ARP L19 head studs for 700+ HP reliability on E85 fuel
Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with custom 3.5" pulley, dual-core intercooler, and Bosch 044 fuel pump upgrade, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise boost control and fuel mapping
Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (QDF7Z), upgraded driveshafts with CV joints from a HSV W427, and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for LS2 torque handling
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a modified HSV W427 rear quarter panel kit, paired with a Rocket Bunny V3-style front bumper and carbon fiber side skirts for aggressive stance
OEM+ interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara), MOMO Prototipo steering wheel, and a custom roll cage (half-cage with bolt-in rear section) by Custom Cages UK

Aggressive aero package: Vortex Generators carbon fiber rear wing (200mm chord), custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a full underside diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for the dual 3.5" Remus Sport exhaust
